//: This repo's default Nitro preset is `cloudflare-module` (see .output/nitro.json),
because production runs on Cloudflare Workers via Lovable. A Vercel build must
override it or it emits a Worker bundle instead of Vercel's Build Output API,
and the deployment fails. NITRO_PRESET=vercel makes `vite build` write
Install command and output directory are deliberately NOT set: the repo commits
bun.lock (package-lock.json is untracked), so Vercel's auto-detection installs
with bun correctly, and the Build Output API needs no outputDirectory.
This file is inert outside Vercel -- the Cloudflare build path is unchanged.
